chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 3381 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORTY. 1. For orders on CMA No. 17634/23 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No. 17635/23 (23 Rule 1) 3. For hearing of CMA No. 15914/23 (stay) 4. For hearing of main case. 11.08.2023. Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Zafar Hussain holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate for Respondents No. 1 & 6. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.5. Mr. G.M Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. ______ 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, learned Counsel for the Petitioner seeks withdrawal of this petition with permission to file a fresh petition in respect of the pending consignment(s). Application is supported by the affidavit of the authorized person of the Petitioner duly sworn before the Identification Branch of this Court. Accordingly, the same is allowed. Petition stands dismissed a withdrawn. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh petition, which shall be dealt with in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
